a b : R

a✝ : Nontrivial R
⊢ (if hq : q.Monic then
      (if h : q.degree ≤ p₁.degree ∧ p₁ ≠ 0 then
          let z := C p₁.leadingCoeff * X ^ (p₁.natDegree - q.natDegree);
          let_fun _wf := ⋯;
          let dm := (p₁ - q * z).divModByMonicAux hq;
          (z + dm.1, dm.2)
        else (0, p₁)).2
    else p₁) =
    if hq : q.Monic then
      (if h : q.degree ≤ p₂.degree ∧ p₂ ≠ 0 then
          let z := C p₂.leadingCoeff * X ^ (p₂.natDegree - q.natDegree);
          let_fun _wf := ⋯;
          let dm := (p₂ - q * z).divModByMonicAux hq;
          (z + dm.1, dm.2)
        else (0, p₂)).2
    else p₂
